title: Ovicopter
move_pattern: Starts with Lay Eggs -> Smash -> Tenderizer -> (branch: Lay Eggs if 3 or fewer allies alive, else Nutritional Paste) -> Smash -> Tenderizer -> ...
notes: Can only lay eggs if there are 3 or fewer other living allies. When at capacity (more than 3 living allies), uses Nutritional Paste instead. Both Lay Eggs and Nutritional Paste transition to Smash next.
